title: eulophia horsfallii
intro: Eulophia horsfallii, also known as the African orchid or Horsfall's eulophia, is a terrestrial orchid species native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Eulophia horsfallii has been reported to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a wound healer. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and then used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures that can be consumed orally or applied topically.
